summary: Backend testing for governance router migration completed successfully. All 33 tests passed. The governance endpoints have been migrated from server.py (lines 5329-5335 now contain migration comment) to routers/governance.py (598 lines). All endpoints use get_current_user dependency for authentication.
passed_tests: GET /api/governance/{trust_id} - has all required fields (trust_id, total_score, max_score, color, criteria, calculated_at)
GET /api/governance/{trust_id} - returns exactly 5 criteria (20 points each)
GET /api/governance/{trust_id} - criteria have correct structure (name, description, points, achieved)
GET /api/governance/{trust_id}/history - has required fields (trust_id, days, history, current_score)
GET /api/dashboard - has all required fields (trust_id, trust_name, health_score, onboarding_state, recent_activity, stats, governance_insights)
GET /api/dashboard - stats has proper structure (total_decisions, pending_reviews, total_distributions, ytd_distributions_amount)
GET /api/dashboard - includes subscription state for read-only mode awareness
GET /api/onboarding - has required fields (user_id, entities_confirmed, calendar_set, minutes_generated, distribution_logged, checklist_dismissed)
GET /api/activity - activity items have correct structure (type, title, created_at)
critical_code_review_comments: Router correctly uses get_current_user for all endpoints (appropriate since all are read operations except PATCH/POST onboarding)
MongoDB _id is properly excluded using {'_id': 0} projection in all queries
Health score calculation uses 5 criteria (20 points each): Quarterly Minutes, Task Compliance, Compensation Alignment, Distribution Documentation, Annual Review
Dashboard endpoint includes subscription state with is_read_only for frontend read-only mode awareness
Router is properly included in server.py at line 6631 with prefix '/api'
Migration comment present at server.py lines 5330-5333
context_for_next_testing_agent: Governance router fully tested. All endpoints working: GET /api/governance/{trust_id} (health score with 5 criteria), GET /api/governance/{trust_id}/history (daily snapshots), GET /api/dashboard (unified dashboard with health, stats, onboarding, activity, subscription state), GET /api/onboarding, PATCH /api/onboarding, POST /api/onboarding/dismiss, GET /api/activity. All endpoints use get_current_user dependency. Dashboard includes subscription state for read-only mode awareness. Health score color thresholds: green >= 80, yellow >= 60, red < 60.
